name: trusted-loop
description: Keep a coding agent working on a long-running, unattended task until an independent ensemble of judge models confirms completion against fresh behavioral evidence — not the agent's own claims.

MAX_ITERATIONS.description: Hard cap on block→continue iterations before the loop finalizes and allows stop.

WALL_CLOCK_MINUTES.description: Wall-clock budget (minutes) after which the loop finalizes regardless of judges.

STUCK_LIMIT.description: Allow stop after this many iterations with no observable change (evidence hash stable).

VERIFY_WITHOUT_GOAL.description: If true, with no goal armed, infer one from the user's last request instead of allowing stop.

NOTIFY_WEBHOOK.description: Optional URL POSTed on stuck / finalize / judge-error so unattended can mean 'notify me'.
